benefits.description: more improvement for wrinkles and skin elasticity, general younger appearance compared to long-term Tretinoin and Tazarotene

protocol_notes: Age 31, female. Started with 3mg daily at week 4, increased to 10mg daily. Claims safe dosage without cycling can be 2-3mg, no adverse effects reported at 5mg daily for years, dosages over 10mg rarely used and may need zinc supplementation (12.5mg daily). Actually uses 9-9.5mg daily without cycling. Believes topical is just addition, real effects only from injections.
